mapper.select: SELECT * FROM booking ORDER BY requested_at DESC
SELECT b.* FROM booking b JOIN lesson l ON b.lesson_id = l.id WHERE l.user_id = #{tutorId} ORDER BY b.requested_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE booking b JOIN lesson l ON b.lesson_id = l.id JOIN tutor_availability anchor ON b.availability_id = anchor.id JOIN tutor_availability ta ON ta.user_id = l.user_id AND ta.start_at < anchor.end_at AND ta.end_at > anchor.start_at AND ta.status IN ('BOOKED', 'CANCELLED', 'OPEN') SET b.canceled_at = NOW(), ta.status = 'OPEN' WHERE b.id = #{id} AND b.canceled_at IS NULL AND b.done_at IS NULL

UPDATE booking b JOIN tutor_availability ta ON b.availability_id = ta.id SET b.done_at = NOW() WHERE b.id = #{id} AND b.canceled_at IS NULL AND b.done_at IS NULL AND b.confirmed_at IS NOT NULL AND ( b.paid_at IS NOT NULL OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM payment p WHERE p.booking_id = b.id AND p.status = 'PAID' AND p.paid_at IS NOT NULL ) ) AND ta.end_at <= NOW()
